---
title: "Nicola Borri"
---

::: {.wrapper}
::: {.main-section}

# Nicola Borri

<div class="subtitle">
Associate Professor of Finance<br>
Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech<br>
Luiss University
</div>

### CV

[My CV is available here.](assets/cv/Nicola_Borri_CV.pdf)

### Research

[My research is listed here.](research.qmd)

### Data & Code

[Data and code resources are listed here.](data-code.qmd)

### Discussions

[Discussion slides are listed here.](discussions.qmd)

### Policy & Media

[Policy writings and media pieces are listed here.](policy-media.qmd)

### Profiles

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Z4QMV08AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)<br>
[SSRN](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/cf_dev/AbsByAuth.cfm?per_id=1131728)<br>
[RePEc](https://ideas.repec.org/f/pbo330.html)<br>
[CitEc](http://citec.repec.org/p/b/pbo330.html)

### Contact

Email: nborri[at]luiss[dot]it<br>
Twitter: [@nicolaborri](https://twitter.com/nicolaborri)

:::
::: {.sidenav}
{{< include _includes/sidebar.qmd >}}
:::
:::
